file.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

This is a book manuscript repository. The book is titled "Avoid Misgovernance in Corporates" by Abhik Pal, a practical guide to corporate governance. The entire manuscript lives in `original_draft.md` (~649KB).

## Structure

- `original_draft.md` — The full book draft. Organized into 5 sections (Leadership, People, Operations, Support Services, Articles) across 30 parts, each containing multiple chapters.

## Working with the Manuscript

- The draft is a single large markdown file. When editing, use targeted edits rather than full rewrites.
- The book uses a consistent chapter naming convention: `Chapter: The "X" syndrome` for most leadership/operations chapters.
- Sections are delimited by bold markdown headers (`**SECTION N – TITLE**`), parts by (`**PART N: Title**`).

[project]
name = "baba-book"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Manuscript tools for 'Avoid Misgovernance in Corporates'"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
    "markdown2>=2.4",
    "weasyprint>=60.0",
]

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

import markdown2

input.old_string:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

This is a book manuscript repository. The book is titled "Avoid Misgovernance in Corporates" by Abhik Pal, a practical guide to corporate governance. The entire manuscript lives in `original_draft.md` (~649KB).

## Structure

- `original_draft.md` — The full book draft. Organized into 5 sections (Leadership, People, Operations, Support Services, Articles) across 30 parts, each containing multiple chapters.

## Working with the Manuscript

- The draft is a single large markdown file. When editing, use targeted edits rather than full rewrites.
- The book uses a consistent chapter naming convention: `Chapter: The "X" syndrome` for most leadership/operations chapters.
- Sections are delimited by bold markdown headers (`**SECTION N – TITLE**`), parts by (`**PART N: Title**`).
input.new_string:
# CLAUDE.md

## Project Overview

Book manuscript repo for "Avoid Misgovernance in Corporates" by Abhik Pal. A practical guide to corporate governance.

## Structure

- `original_draft.md` — Full book draft (~649KB). 5 sections, 30 parts, multiple chapters each.
- `chapters/` — Individual chapter markdown files split by section (`00_frontmatter/`, `01_leadership/`, `02_people/`, `03_operations/`, `04_support_services/`, `05_articles/`). `chapters/index.md` defines chapter ordering.
- `generate_pdf.py` — Converts chapter markdown files into `book.pdf` using markdown2 + WeasyPrint.
- `split_manuscript.py` — Splits `original_draft.md` into individual chapter files.

## Working with the Manuscript

- Sections are delimited by `**SECTION N – TITLE**`, parts by `**PART N: Title**`.
- Chapter naming convention: `Chapter: The "X" syndrome` for most chapters.
- When editing, use targeted edits rather than full rewrites.

## Development

Uses `uv` for dependency management and virtual environment:

```sh
uv sync              # Install dependencies and create .venv
uv run generate_pdf.py  # Generate book.pdf from chapter files
```

Dependencies: `markdown2`, `weasyprint` (see `pyproject.toml`).

input.content:
# Avoid Misgovernance in Corporates

**A Practical Guide to Right Governance for the Leaders of Tomorrow**

*By Abhik Pal — Former Executive Vice President & SBU Head, Tata Projects Limited*

---

A candid, experience-driven guide to corporate governance covering the dysfunctions, behavioural patterns, and systemic failures that derail organisations. Written from decades of first-hand observation across leadership, people management, operations, and support functions.

## Read the Book

The latest compiled version is available as **[book.pdf](book.pdf)**.

## Browse the Chapters

Chapters are organised under [`chapters/`](chapters/) by section:

| Section | Directory |
|---------|-----------|
| Frontmatter (Introduction, Preface, About the Author) | [`chapters/00_frontmatter/`](chapters/00_frontmatter/) |
| Section 1 — Leadership | [`chapters/01_leadership/`](chapters/01_leadership/) |
| Section 2 — People | [`chapters/02_people/`](chapters/02_people/) |
| Section 3 — Operations | [`chapters/03_operations/`](chapters/03_operations/) |
| Section 4 — Support Services | [`chapters/04_support_services/`](chapters/04_support_services/) |
| Section 5 — Articles & Annexures | [`chapters/05_articles/`](chapters/05_articles/) |

The full reading order is in [`chapters/index.md`](chapters/index.md).

## Editorial History

All proofreading and editorial changes applied to the manuscript are logged in [`EDIT_SUMMARY.md`](EDIT_SUMMARY.md), organised by section, part, and chapter.

## Regenerate the PDF

Requires Python 3.10+ and [`uv`](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).

```sh
uv sync                       # install dependencies into .venv
uv run generate_pdf.py        # writes book.pdf
```

Dependencies (`markdown2`, `weasyprint`) are declared in [`pyproject.toml`](pyproject.toml).

**A Practical Guide to Right Governance for the Leaders of Tomorrow**

*By Abhik Pal — Former Executive Vice President & SBU Head, Tata Projects Limited*

---

A candid, experience-driven guide to corporate governance covering the dysfunctions, behavioural patterns, and systemic failures that derail organisations. Written from decades of first-hand observation across leadership, people management, operations, and support functions.

## Read the Book

The latest compiled version is available as **[book.pdf](book.pdf)**.

## Browse the Chapters

Chapters are organised under [`chapters/`](chapters/) by section:

| Section | Directory |
|---------|-----------|
| Frontmatter (Introduction, Preface, About the Author) | [`chapters/00_frontmatter/`](chapters/00_frontmatter/) |
| Section 1 — Leadership | [`chapters/01_leadership/`](chapters/01_leadership/) |
| Section 2 — People | [`chapters/02_people/`](chapters/02_people/) |
| Section 3 — Operations | [`chapters/03_operations/`](chapters/03_operations/) |
| Section 4 — Support Services | [`chapters/04_support_services/`](chapters/04_support_services/) |
| Section 5 — Articles & Annexures | [`chapters/05_articles/`](chapters/05_articles/) |

The full reading order is in [`chapters/index.md`](chapters/index.md).

## Editorial History

All proofreading and editorial changes applied to the manuscript are logged in [`EDIT_SUMMARY.md`](EDIT_SUMMARY.md), organised by section, part, and chapter.

## Regenerate the PDF

Requires Python 3.10+ and [`uv`](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).

```sh
uv sync                       # install dependencies into .venv
uv run generate_pdf.py        # writes book.pdf
```

Dependencies (`markdown2`, `weasyprint`) are declared in [`pyproject.toml`](pyproject.toml).
